Amenities

Everything you need,
steps from the bay.

From a 220-foot private beach to fully equipped kitchens, every detail is here so your only decision is sunrise on the deck or sunset on the sand.

220ft Private Beach
On the Bay

A private stretch of Peconic shoreline.

Step out of your suite and onto soft, sandy beach — yours to enjoy from sunrise to last light.

Our 220-foot waterfront is set up the way our guests actually use it. Adirondack chairs angled toward the sunset. Garden umbrellas already up. Kayaks and paddle boards waiting at the water's edge whenever the bay calls.

Kayak Rentals Paddle Boards Garden Umbrellas Adirondack Chairs
Out on the Water

Slow days, shallow water.

Peconic Bay's calm, shallow water makes this one of the best spots on Long Island to learn — or simply to drift.

In Your Suite

Designed to feel like your own.

Each studio and suite is built for the way North Fork weekends actually unfold — slow mornings on the deck, dinner cooked from a farmstand haul, and water views from every window.

i.

Fully Equipped Kitchen

Stove, microwave, full fridge, cookware, and everything else you need to make the most of farm-stand finds and fresh-caught fish.

ii.

Private Deck

A bay-view balcony off every room, with table and chairs — perfect for morning coffee or watching the sun fall behind the water.

iii.

Complimentary Wi-Fi

Strong, dependable Wi-Fi throughout the property — for the work-from-anywhere crowd or just streaming a movie after a beach day.

On the Grounds

A backyard built for gathering.

Open lawn, BBQ grills with bay views, and Adirondacks tucked under the cedars.

The lawn is where mornings start with coffee on the porch and end with dinner on the grill. Bring the family, bring the dog (well, almost), bring your bike — there's plenty of room to spread out and a picnic table waiting whenever you need one.

BBQ Grills

Communal grills with bay views — fire one up and let dinner be the slowest part of your day.

Bicycle Rack

Bring your bikes — North Fork wineries, farmstands, and the village are all within an easy ride.

Cable TV in Every Suite

For rainy afternoons or unwinding at the end of a day in the sun.

On-Site Front Desk

Need a wine-country recommendation or a kayak set up? Susan and the team are here whenever you need us.

On the Lawn

Wellness, with a sea breeze.

Open-air yoga and seasonal wellness gatherings on the property's main lawn.

Throughout the season we host outdoor yoga, group sessions, and small wellness retreats — guests are welcome to join. Mats out, shoes off, bay air doing the rest. Ask the front desk what's coming up during your stay.

Reserve Your Stay

Your North Fork escape
is already set up.

Book your suite directly and get the best available rate, every time.
